title: helianthus debilis f. cucumerifolius
intro: Helianthus debilis f. cucumerifolius, also known as the beach sunflower or cucumber leafed prairie coneflower, is a flowering plant species native to the coastal regions of East Asia. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Helianthus debilis f. cucumerifolius have been reported to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal use, which can be found in traditional Asian medicine and some modern herbal remedies.
